References & Further Reading ​

Academic Papers ​

#CitationTopic
[1]Greshake et al. "Not What You've Signed Up For." BlackHat USA 2023Indirect Prompt Injection
[2]Liu et al. "Taming OpenClaw." Tsinghua/Ant Group, 2026Agent threat analysis
[3]Zhang et al. "Don't Let the Claw Grip Your Hand." Shandong Univ, 2026Security framework
[4]Chen et al. "OpenClaw PRISM." UNSW, 2026Runtime security layer
[5]Wang et al. "PASB." Xidian Univ, 2026Agent security benchmark
[6]Dong et al. "MINJA." NeurIPS 2025Memory injection attacks
[7]Li et al. "MemoryGraft." Dec 2025Poisoned experience retrieval
[8]"Agentic AI Security." Oct 2025Comprehensive threat survey
[9]PIGuard/InjecGuard. ACL 2025Prompt injection guardrails
[10]"AgentTrace." Feb 2026Agent logging framework
[11]"Log-To-Leak." OpenReview, 2025MCP-based exfiltration
[34]Hagendorff et al. Nature Communications 2026Autonomous jailbreak agents
[33]"Secret Collusion among AI Agents." arXiv 2024Steganographic collusion
